svg.title: BruteForce index overview
svg.desc: BruteForce stores vectors in a single flat array and, for each query, computes the distance against every stored vector and keeps the smallest distances in a top-k heap. The scan can be split across multiple threads via the parallelism parameter; the result is exact when base_quantization_type is fp32.
svg.text: Exact flat scan · distance computed against every stored vector · optional intra-query parallelism

g.text: one row of dense cells · no graph · no inverted lists
scan every vector · compute d(q, v_i)
